title: Fix core.clj: replace removed Pedestal APIs with create-connector
content:
Update `modules/grpc-server/src/protojure/pedestal/core.clj` to compile against Pedestal 0.8.1.

**Remove requires:**
- `[io.pedestal.http :as http]` — namespace deleted in 0.8
- `[io.pedestal.interceptor.helpers :as pedestal.interceptors]` — namespace deleted in 0.8

**Add requires:**
- `[io.pedestal.interceptor :as pedestal.interceptor]`
- `[io.pedestal.service.protocols :as pedestal.protocols]`
- `[io.pedestal.connector.test :as conn.test]`

**Fix `chain-execute`** (line 307) — replace `pedestal.interceptors/on-response` with a manual leave interceptor:
```clojure
(defn chain-execute [request interceptors]
  (p/create
   (fn [resolve reject]
     (let [response-handler (pedestal.interceptor/interceptor
                              {:name ::container
                               :leave (fn [context]
                                        (resolve (:response context))
                                        context)})]
       (pedestal.chain/execute {:request request} (cons response-handler interceptors))))))
```

**Fix `provider`** (line 399) — change `::http/interceptors` to `:interceptors`:
```clojure
(let [interceptors (:interceptors connector-map)
```

**Add `UndertowConnector` record + `create-connector` function** implementing `PedestalConnector` protocol — see spec [[s-4b2k]] for full implementation.

**Remove `provider` and `config`** — these were only ever wired via the now-deleted `::http/chain-provider` and `::http/type` service-map keys. They have no call sites once the test harness is updated.

Acceptance: `(require 'protojure.pedestal.core)` loads without error.

title: Fix anonymous interceptor warning in grpc.clj
content:
Fix the anonymous interceptor deprecation warning produced when `protojure.pedestal.interceptors.grpc` loads.

**Root cause:** `err/error-dispatch` macro in `io.pedestal.interceptor.error` produces an unnamed interceptor in Pedestal 0.8. Verified: `(:name (err/error-dispatch ...))` returns `nil`.

**Fix** — add `:name` via `assoc` after creation in `interceptors/grpc.clj` (line 162):
```clojure
(def error-interceptor
  (assoc (err/error-dispatch
          [ctx ex]
          [{:exception-type ::status/error}]
          (let [{:keys [code msg]} (ex-data ex)]
            (err-status ctx code msg))
          :else
          (err-status ctx (grpc.status/get-code :internal) (ex-message ex)))
         :name ::error-interceptor))
```

Acceptance: Loading `protojure.pedestal.interceptors.grpc` produces no deprecation warnings.

title: Migrate test harness from io.pedestal.http to io.pedestal.connector
content:
Update all four test files to compile and run against Pedestal 0.8.1. Depends on [[i-719f]]{ blocks } being done first since tests use `core/create-connector`.

### `test/test/protojure/test/utils.clj`
Replace `io.pedestal.http` with `io.pedestal.connector`. Rename `start-pedestal-server` → `start-connector` (or keep old name for minimal diff):
```clojure
(ns protojure.test.utils
  (:require [clojure.data :as data]
            [io.pedestal.connector :as conn]))

(defn start-connector [connector]
  (conn/start! connector))
```

### `test/test/protojure/pedestal_test.clj`
- Replace `[io.pedestal.http :as http]` with `[io.pedestal.connector :as conn]`
- Add `[io.pedestal.service.interceptors :as svc.interceptors]`
- `http/html-body` → `svc.interceptors/html-body`
- `io.pedestal.http/json-body` → `svc.interceptors/json-body`
- Replace service-map + `http/create-server` + `http/start` with connector builder + `conn/start!`
- Replace `http/stop` with `conn/stop!`

### `test/test/protojure/grpc_test.clj`
- Replace `[io.pedestal.http :as pedestal]` with `[io.pedestal.connector :as conn]`
- Add `[io.pedestal.service.interceptors :as svc.interceptors]`
- `pedestal/html-body` → `svc.interceptors/html-body`
- Replace `::pedestal/routes`, `::pedestal/port`, `::pedestal/type`, `::pedestal/chain-provider` service-map with connector builder
- Replace `test.utils/start-pedestal-server` with connector builder + `conn/start!`
- Replace `pedestal/stop` → `conn/stop!` (two call sites: line 459 and line 708)

### `test/test/protojure/grpc_web_test.clj`
- Remove `[io.pedestal.test :refer [response-for]]` and `[io.pedestal.http :as pedestal]`
- Add `[io.pedestal.connector :as conn]` and `[io.pedestal.connector.test :as conn.test]`
- Replace `create-servlet` service setup with `core/create-connector`
- Replace all `response-for` call sites with `conn.test/response-for` (new signature: connector as first arg, then method, url, and keyword options)

Acceptance: `lein with-profile dev test` passes all tests with no compile errors.
